summary: Iteration 177: Tested Shadcn Select currency dropdown fix in ColHeader.tsx across Resources, Products, and Subscriptions tabs. All 8 test scenarios passed. The fix (replacing native <select> with Shadcn Select + __any__ sentinel) works correctly - currency selection fires onValueChange, filters apply properly, and clear/reset functions work.
test_credentials: Partner code: automate-accounts | Admin: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: ColHeader.tsx Shadcn Select fix verified. All currency filter scenarios pass: Resources USD (1 result), Resources GBP (0 results), Any currency reset (all results), combined Min=50+USD (1 result), Clear button (resets filter+blue dot), Products PRICE currency select, Subscriptions AMOUNT currency select. Blue dot indicator correctly appears/disappears based on filter state. The __any__ sentinel value is properly converted back to undefined onValueChange. Currency options shown: Any currency, AUD, CAD, EUR, GBP, INR, MXN, USD.

evidence: Shadcn Select trigger shows 'Any currency' by default
Selecting USD: trigger updates to 'USD', 1 resource shown (test resource USD 100)
Selecting GBP: trigger updates to 'GBP', 0 resources shown
Selecting 'Any currency': trigger resets, all 1 resource restored
Combined Min=50 + USD: 1 resource shown (100 >= 50, currency = USD)
Clear button: resets currency to undefined, blue dot removed, all resources restored
Blue dot on PRICE header appears when currency is set, disappears after reset/clear
Products tab PRICE filter has Shadcn Select with 'Any currency' default
USD selection works: trigger shows 'USD', blue dot appears on PRICE column
Filter reduces product count from 23 to 21 (only USD-priced products)
Subscriptions tab AMOUNT filter has Shadcn Select with 'Any currency' default
Currency options: Any currency, AUD, CAD, EUR, GBP, INR, MXN, USD
AUD selection works: trigger shows 'AUD', blue dot appears on AMOUNT column
Clear button present and visible when filter is active
